content:
## EDUCATION

University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign (UIUC) - M.S. in Computer Science

2020.09 - 2022.01

Coursework: Distributed Systems; Computer Networks; Computer Graphics; Natural Language Processing

University of Michigan, Ann Arbor (UMich) - B.S. in Computer Science

2017.09 - 2020.05

Coursework: Databases; Machine Learning; Operating Systems; Computer Vision; Network Design

## WORK EXPERIENCE

## Quantitative C++ Developer, Domestic Hedge Fund (5-15B RMB AUM)

## Distributed Factor Computation Platform (0→1, led design & implementation)

1. Designed  a  C++  operator  library  from  scratch:  time-series  /  cross-sectional  /  group  operators, differentially  optimized  for  backtest  vs.  live  data  characteristics;  pybind  wrappers  let  researchers  run the same code in both bt and live with zero migration cost
2. Deep  optimization  on  hot  paths  in  high-frequency  workloads:  stripped  abstraction  overhead  and shortened  call  chains;  single-operator-call  latency  reduced  to  the  sub-microsecond  (hundreds-of-ns) range
3. Built distributed task scheduling on Redis from scratch, with Airflow for workflow visualization
4. End-to-end automation: factor submission → search → validation → storage → live production, fully closed-loop; running stably across 20 machines for 2+ years with peak daily workload of 1M+ factor computations

## Deep Learning Data Pipeline Optimization

1. End-to-end  disk  →  mem  →  GPU  throughput  benchmarking  and  bottleneck  analysis;  evaluated  and selected among mainstream DL storage formats
2. Rewrote  PyTorch  async  DataLoader  from  scratch,  eliminating  synchronous  blocking  points  and improving GPU utilization

## Independent Project - Live Trading System (C++/Python, Multi-Market)

2025 - Present

Built an end-to-end pipeline from L2 market data to order execution, supporting A-share and Crypto

1. A-share tick-level order book + high-frequency factor engine (C++): unified order book for SSE/SZSE; CRTP-based  compile-time  static  dispatch  for  the  factor  pipeline;  700  factors  per  cross-section computed in 300ms total, full-market on a single machine
2. End-to-end  low-latency  messaging  (C++):  Gateway  callback  →  per-channel  worker  threads  → Aggregator → PUB, built on ZMQ (inproc/ipc/tcp) with msgpack binary encoding
3. Python  OMS  (multi-market  abstraction):  TraderService  for  order  routing  +  ParentOrder  base  class managing order state machines; algo orders implemented as per-market subclasses; MarketGateway / TraderGateway abstract the market-data and trading adapters, with full implementations for Binance Futures and A-share (QMT)

## Quantitative Developer, IDEA

## Algo Trading Module Refactor

2022.01 - 2023.06

## Jackal

271835525@qq.com | 18943181643

2023.07 - Present

1. Independent  process  +  shared  memory  +  lock-free  SPSC  queues  for  IPC  with  the  trading  main process; thread pool for parallel market-data / execution-report dispatch
2. Implemented VWAP / Iceberg / IS / Sniper execution algorithms on the new framework

## High-Performance C++ Operator Library

1. Built entirely in-house, replacing the first-generation Eigen-based implementation; supports time-series / cross-sectional / group operators; multi-threaded, streaming + SIMD-optimized
2. Paired with an automated factor-search system (in-house GP algorithm, multi-machine parallel)

## Infrastructure Intern, ByteDance

2021.06 - 2021.12

Developed the ARP module for a DPDK user-space network stack; built a write-priority logging system on top of a lock-free SPMC ring buffer

## SKILLS

- C++17: multi-threading / lock-free (SPSC, SPMC); template metaprogramming (CRTP, concepts, static dispatch); perf / gdb
- Low-latency & Systems: DPDK user-space networking; shared-memory IPC; ZMQ (inproc/ipc/tcp); msgpack
- Python: asyncio; numpy/pandas; pybind; xtquant / binance-connector; shm / mmap; PyTorch async DataLoader
- Data & Storage: HDF5; Parquet; Redis; custom binary formats
- Ops: Linux performance tuning; git; docker; Airflow
- AI Agents: using Claude Code CLI (Max) since 2025
